descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.8 for sale 2024 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Excluded

Bali 4.8 for sale 2024 — a practical and well-equipped catamaran in good condition, offered by Catana Group. This Bali 4.8 for sale 2024 is Italian-registered and built in 2024, presenting a modern cruising platform designed for comfortable life aboard and straightforward handling. She is in good condition and ready for inspection; the boat is visible in Sicily.

Below is a clear specification list for quick reference - Bali 4.8 for sale 2024:

General

  • Manufacturer: Catana Group
  • Model: Bali 4.8
  • Registration/Nature: Italian, registered (pleasure craft)
  • Year of construction: 2024
  • Safety certificate expiry: 2033
  • Location: Sicily
  • Note: Boat visible in Sicily

Dimensions & capacity

  • Overall length: 14.86 m
  • Beam: 7.88 m
  • Draft: 1.35 m
  • Displacement: 22,000 kg
  • Number of owners: 1
  • CE Certification / Passenger capacity: A12 / B14 / C24 / D40 / Category A

Hull & deck

  • Hull colour: White
  • Hull material: GRP (vtr)
  • Keel material / shape: GRP / skeg (scarponi)
  • Cockpit teak: Yes (stern, steps, access)
  • Upholstery: Complete — folding fore sunpad, flybridge cushions with backrests, foredeck cockpit cushions, helmsman seat cushions, flybridge seating cushions
  • Bimini: Yes (fixed stainless frame + canvas)
  • Cockpit tables: Yes (foredeck + flybridge)

Notes: Teflon protections at stern, spring cleats at stern, integrated external BBQ

Accommodation & galley

  • Double cabins: 4
  • Double/twin cabin: 1 (with bunk bed)
  • Crew cabin: 1
  • Bathrooms: 5 (electric, freshwater)
  • Showers: 5
  • Interior wood finish: Light
  • Cooker: Yes (4 gas burners with pot retainers)
  • Oven: Yes
  • Fridge: Yes (American-style 635 l double door with freezer)

Note: Separate skipper head and shower forward, bottle holder integrated into dinette table, front galley window opening, companionway/fore cockpit access door, folding transom, dishwasher (9 place), microwave, 12.5 kW generator

Engine & propulsion

  • Engines: 2
  • Type: Inboard
  • Make: Yanmar
  • Model: 4JH80
  • Power: 80 hp x 2
  • Engine year: 2025
  • Fuel capacity: 1000 litres
  • Transmission: s-drive
  • Propellers: Fixed blades
  • Steering: Wheel

Electronics & navigation

  • Autopilot: Yes (Raymarine P70)
  • VHF: Yes (dual)
  • Echo sounder: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes (Axiom 7" interior, 12" exterior at helm)
  • Wind instrument: Yes

Notes: Raymarine instrumentation, multi-display, AIS

Electrical & systems

  • Voltage: 12 / 220 V
  • Batteries: 6 (4 gel + 2) — total 720 Ah
  • Water tanks: 2 (1+1) — total 1000 litres (GRP)
  • Bilge pumps: 2 + 2 (automatic + manual)
  • Heating: Yes (via inverter / air conditioning)
  • Charger / inverter: Yes
  • Air conditioning: Yes (cabins, inverter hot/cold)
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Pressurised water (autoclave): Yes
  • Black water: Yes
  • Deck shower: Yes
  • Desalinator: 230V, 240 l/hr

Rigging & anchoring

  • Mast: Aluminium, stepped
  • Winches: 2
  • Lazy bag: Yes
  • Furling jib: Yes
  • Windlass: Yes (with 70 m chain)
  • Anchor: Yes (Delta)
  • Mooring lines: Yes
  • Life raft: Yes (for 12 persons, expiry 2027)
  • Fenders: 6

This Bali 4.8 for sale 2024 is offered in good condition and represents a practical choice for buyers seeking generous living space, modern systems and comfortable cruising capability. For viewings or further technical information, the boat is currently located in Sicily.
